vulnerabilities.description: No middleware has been implemented for Helmet and CORS configurations.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware to set security-related HTTP headers and CORS with a whitelist.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is mentioned but not currently implemented.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate-limiting middleware to restrict the number of requests to the server.

vulnerabilities.description: Sensitive information may leak in logs due to the use of console.error for logging environment variable validation errors.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement a proper logging solution (e.g., Winston/Pino) that sanitizes sensitive information before logging.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization and validation efforts should be increased, particularly regarding the expected input on various endpoints.
vulnerabilities.fix: Employ libraries like Joi or express-validator for comprehensive input validation and sanitation on all API endpoints.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT configuration needs to be assessed for proper security configurations.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that JWT is implemented with secure storage, expiration, and invalidation mechanisms.
